overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a torchlit swamp village at dusk, transitioning from wooden boardwalks to dirt paths as he approaches a distant manor with a campfire.

scene_state.functional_zone: swamp village boardwalk with thatched huts

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the swamp village boardwalks, passing villagers and wooden huts

notable_agents.action: villager woman in dress walking past the camera

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the main path through the village
traditional wooden hut with straw roof built on stilts over water
large wooden barrel placed beside the walkway
wooden post with burning torch providing warm orange light
wooden stall with canvas awning selling goods

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a dense swamp village built on wooden stilts, passing thatched huts and villagers. The narrow walkway is lined with barrels and torch posts casting warm light against the blue dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden bridge over open swamp water

events.description: exits the dense village area onto a raised wooden bridge over open water

agents.ego_description: continuing across the wooden bridge leaving the village center behind

notable_agents.action: villager walking ahead on the bridge toward the swamp

entered.detail: elevated wooden walkway with rope railings spanning the swamp
thick rope handrails along the bridge sides
murky water visible between the wooden planks on the right side

segments.scene_description: Leaving the dense village, Geralt crosses an elevated wooden bridge with rope railings. Open swamp water becomes visible on the right while the village structures fall behind, and fewer villagers are present.

scene_state.functional_zone: swamp trail with stone walls and pine forest

events.description: transitioning from wooden walkway to dirt path surrounded by stone walls and trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path through the swamp, away from the village into the wilderness

entered.detail: muddy trail winding through the swamp grass and trees
low stone wall running alongside the left side of the path
small dilapidated wooden structure beside the trail
dense pine trees forming the swamp forest backdrop

segments.scene_description: The wooden walkway ends and Geralt continues on a dirt path through the open swamp. Stone walls line the trail while pine forests rise in the background, and the area is devoid of villagers.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching manor house with campfire gathering

events.description: campfire light becomes visible ahead near the manor house

agents.ego_description: approaching a manor house with a campfire where villagers are gathered in the distance

notable_agents.action: group of villagers gathered around the campfire ahead

entered.detail: large two-story wooden manor with lit windows and stone chimney
burning campfire with visible flames and smoke near the manor entrance

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches a manor house in the distance, where a campfire burns and villagers gather. The dirt path continues between stone walls as the warm firelight contrasts with the cool dusk atmosphere of the surrounding swamp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a torchlit swamp village that gradually opens into a desolate wilderness leading toward a distant manor. It begins on narrow wooden walkways among thatched huts and villagers, where warm torchlight contrasts with the deep blue of the dusk sky. As the camera moves forward, the dense village structures fall away and the path elevates onto a wooden bridge with rope railings, revealing open swamp water to the right. The scene then shifts as the wooden planks give way to a dirt path lined with stone walls, moving away from the settlement and toward a backdrop of rising pine forests. Finally, the trail leads toward a manor house in the distance, where the cool atmosphere of the swamp meets the warm glow of a gathering campfire.
